# Airlock Vertical KB — Orbit Platform (docs)
> Documentation for the airlock-vertical-kb Claude Code skill: generates bilingual
> (EN/ES) knowledge bases, voice/chat agents, and websites for 40 business verticals.

## Pages
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/docs/: Airlock Vertical Knowledge Base Generator — v2 (Elemental)
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/docs/UPGRADE-NOTES.html: Airlock Vertical KB — v2 Upgrade Notes
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/docs/references__aeo-guide.html: Orbit AI — AEO / llms.txt IMPLEMENTATION GUIDE
- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/docs/references__build-pipeline.html: Orbit AI — BUILD PIPELINE & DEFINITION-OF-READY

- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/docs/references__compliance-patterns.html: Compliance Patterns (cross-vertical)

- https://jonathan777-ui.github.io/orbit-platform/docs/references__local-landing-pages.html: Orbit AI — LOCAL LANDING PAGE SYSTEM
